summary.headline: DevSecOps Engineer & Cloud Finance Architect
summary.bio: DevSecOps Engineer at Storm Technology with 13+ years of cloud infrastructure and financial systems experience across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments. Specialized in FinOps, cost optimization, security architecture, and building intelligent data pipelines. Pursuing Finance MBA at IIT Patna (2024-2026) to combine deep technical expertise with financial acumen for enterprise cloud economics.
